twitter_posts.title: R to @AnthropicAI: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are p
twitter_posts.description:
Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are plenty of other ways they can go wrong.

Policy and legal frameworks will need to adapt to keep up.

twitter_posts.title: R to @AnthropicAI: To our amazement, another Claude agent modeled its human’s preferences so accurately that—based on only an offhand mention of an interest in skiing—Claude bought him the exact snowb
twitter_posts.description: To our amazement, another Claude agent modeled its human’s preferences so accurately that—based on only an offhand mention of an interest in skiing—Claude bought him the exact snowboard he already owned. (Here he is, duplicate snowboard in hand.)

In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits

articles.title: Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
articles.description: Elon Musk officially began his testimony in the trial he has brought against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and company president Greg Brockman.
